items.title: Reddy: 'You've got to do something about your mindset' in order to succeed
items.summary: "It all depends on the situation; you have to use the situation according to you," Nitish Kumar Reddy says after playing a key role in India's win over Afghanistan in the first ODI
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Knicks' Jalen Brunson disproves the 'small guy' doubters as he wins Finals MVP
items.summary: Becky Hammon said Brunson wasn't a '1A' dude, and she wasn't alone in her skepticism
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: ‘He is him’: indomitable Jalen Brunson quiets doubters as Knicks end 53-year wait
